jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - PropEquity - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
